nasb.text: wild waves of the sea, casting up their own shame like foam; wandering stars, for whom the black darkness has been reserved forever.

esv.text: wild waves of the sea, casting up the foam of their own shame; wandering stars, for whom the gloom of utter darkness has been reserved forever.

cnv.text: 是海中的狂浪，濺起了自己可恥的泡沫；是流蕩的星，有漆黑的幽暗永遠為他們存留。

ccb.text: 他们是海中的狂涛，翻动着自己可耻的泡沫，是流荡的星星，有幽幽黑暗永远留给他们。

csbs.text: 是海中的狂浪，涌出自己可耻的泡沫；是流荡的星辰，有漆黑的幽暗永远为他们存留。
